title: bot payment.rs: --auto-payment-address sends STUB address to real peers
description: bot/src/payment.rs maybe_auto_respond() sends 'STUB_TESTNET_ADDRESS_<session_id>' as a payment address when --auto-payment-address is enabled. This would cause real peers to attempt payment to a non-existent address. The flag is hidden but not documented as non-functional. Should either be wired to the real wallet (Zcash/Monero) or the flag should print a clear error if no wallet is configured. File: /home/mark/PROJECT/nie/bot/src/payment.rs line 56.
